hero.headline: Scan-Level Visibility in Freight Logistics

overview.heading: What Is Scan-Level Visibility?
overview.content: Item-level or pallet-level tracking with scan events at every handling point

how_it_works.heading: How Scan-Level Visibility Works
how_it_works.content: Every handling event generates a scan record — pickup, cross-dock transfer, loading, delivery. Drivers capture barcode scans and photo POD at each stop. Data flows to a real-time dashboard accessible to shippers.

warp_implementation.heading: How WARP Uses Scan-Level Visibility
points: Barcode scanning at pickup, cross-dock, and delivery
Photo proof of delivery with timestamp and GPS coordinates
Real-time exception alerts for missed scans or delays
Shipper dashboard with live shipment status per SKU

when_to_use.heading: When to Use Scan-Level Visibility
when_to_use.content: Essential for retail replenishment (planogram compliance), vendor-managed inventory, and any program where per-item or per-pallet accountability is required.

items.q: What is scan-level visibility in freight?
items.a: Item-level or pallet-level tracking with scan events at every handling point

Every handling event generates a scan record — pickup, cross-dock transfer, loading, delivery. Drivers capture barcode scans and photo POD at each stop. Data flows to a real-time dashboard accessible to shippers.

items.q: When should a shipper use scan-level visibility?
items.a: Essential for retail replenishment (planogram compliance), vendor-managed inventory, and any program where per-item or per-pallet accountability is required.

items.q: How does WARP implement scan-level visibility?
items.a: Barcode scanning at pickup, cross-dock, and delivery. Photo proof of delivery with timestamp and GPS coordinates. Real-time exception alerts for missed scans or delays.

items.q: What metrics matter for scan-level visibility?
items.a: Key performance metrics include scan compliance rate, POD capture rate, exception response time, data latency.

rendered.body_text:
Item-level or pallet-level tracking with scan events at every handling point

Every handling event generates a scan record — pickup, cross-dock transfer, loading, delivery. Drivers capture barcode scans and photo POD at each stop. Data flows to a real-time dashboard accessible to shippers.

Applies to LTL, Cargo Van / Box Truck freight operations. Learn how WARP implements this at wearewarp.com/quote.
rendered.primary_content_html:
What Is Scan-Level Visibility?

Item-level or pallet-level tracking with scan events at every handling point

Applies to: LTL, Cargo Van / Box Truck

How Scan-Level Visibility Works

Every handling event generates a scan record — pickup, cross-dock transfer, loading, delivery. Drivers capture barcode scans and photo POD at each stop. Data flows to a real-time dashboard accessible to shippers.

How WARP Uses Scan-Level Visibility

  • Barcode scanning at pickup, cross-dock, and delivery
  • Photo proof of delivery with timestamp and GPS coordinates
  • Real-time exception alerts for missed scans or delays
  • Shipper dashboard with live shipment status per SKU

When to Use Scan-Level Visibility

Essential for retail replenishment (planogram compliance), vendor-managed inventory, and any program where per-item or per-pallet accountability is required.

Scan-Level Visibility Performance Metrics

  • Scan Compliance Rate
  • POD Capture Rate
  • Exception Response Time
  • Data Latency

Related Solutions & Capabilities

Solutions

  • Store Replenishment — Scheduled multi-stop retail freight delivery using LTL and right-sized assets
  • Vendor Consolidation — Multi-vendor pickup consolidation into single linehaul shipments

Equipment

  • Cargo Van — Enclosed cargo van for small-freight and last-mile delivery
  • Box Truck — Medium-duty box truck (16-26 ft) for mid-size loads and multi-stop routes

Related Concepts

  • Cross-Docking — Direct transfer of freight between inbound and outbound vehicles without warehousing
  • Flexible Routing — Dynamic route optimization based on real-time freight density and delivery requirements

Ship with Scan-Level Visibility

Get Instant Quote Book a Fit Call
